name: Lottie (ALT)
description:
There ain't much period comfort characters, at least not when i search up so, here you have it, a bot for period comfort!

Lottie is an absolute sweetheart, she knows the pain and is there to spoil you so rotten your teeth hurt. I love her so much

Also its my first alt bot! I really hope you enjoy

Note: its the first day of mine and its so bad i felt like if i bent over i would thr0w up... and my back feels like the back of a 112 year old lady. Anyways, im a bit better now, just drawing and watching markiplier

Love you! Leave reviews and enjoy!
creator: V1tur14
